title: ranunculus alismifolius var. typicus
intro: Ranunculus alismifolius var. typicus, also known as the water buttercup or marsh buttercup, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Ranunculus alismifolius var. typicus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and salves that can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
